name: effect-docs
title: Effect Docs
description: Search Effect-TS documentation and API reference from Raycast
author: rvaccone

commands.name: search-effect
commands.title: Search Docs
commands.subtitle: Effect Guides & API Reference
commands.description: Search Effect guides and API reference

commands.name: ask-effect-ai
commands.title: Ask Effect Docs
commands.description: Ask an AI assistant about Effect docs

tools.name: search-guides
tools.title: Search Guides
tools.description: Search Effect-TS guides and documentation for relevant articles, tutorials, and conceptual topics. Use this when the user asks about patterns, concepts, best practices, or 'how to' questions.

tools.name: search-api
tools.title: Search API Reference
tools.description: Search Effect-TS API reference for specific functions, modules, and types. Use this when the user asks about a named API, type signatures, or implementation details.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the `prepublishOnly` script and rerun `npm publish` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use `npm run publish` instead.

" && exit 1
